html:
Exclusive to:

The Cracked Pillars are naturally spawning structures exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Wilson Rework Update. They appear at the first day of the world in the Muddy Biome in the Caves, along with the Nightmare Werepig that chained in place.

The Cracked Pillars possess a layer of Marble that can be mined to expose the Dreadstone that prevents the Nightmare Werepig from moving.

Hitting an exposed Cracked Pillar with a strong mining tool will cause it to vibrate for a short period of time, which will loosen its chain. Making all Cracked Pillars vibrate at the same time frees the Nightmare Werepig and initiates the boss fight. The tools that work to vibrate the Pillars are:

  • Pick/Axe
  • Brightshade Smasher
  • Woodie as Werebeaver with the The Werebeaver III Skill

The Nightmare Werepig's ground slam attack is the only thing that can ultimately destroy the Cracked Pillars, dropping 3-4 Dreadstones and 1 Marble with 50% chance.

After defeating the Nightmare Werepig, the Scrappy Werepig can be found in Teetering Junk Pile on the surface after 10 days. The player has to defeat the Scrappy Werepig and wait for another 10 days for the Cracked Pillar set piece and Nightmare Werepig to reappear in the Muddy Biome.

Gallery

  • Cracked Pillar Fall
  • Cracked Pillar Map Icon
  • Old Cracked Pillar Texture
  • Old Cracked Pillar Fall
  • Old Cracked Pillar Shake

"daywalker_pillar"
Exclusive to:
“There's something glinting inside the marble.”
–Wilson
“How crazy would I have to be to try and break that pillar?”
–Willow
“Mighty Wolfgang could break pillar!”
–Wolfgang
“We are all tethered to this place in one way or another.”
–Wendy
“STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY COMPROMISED”
–WX-78
“How odd... the marble appears to be encasing something.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks sturdy... ish.”
–Woodie
“I can just make out something dark within.”
–Maxwell
“The pillar is weakened... mayhaps it could be broken.”
–Wigfrid
“We feel bad just leaving him like that...”
–Webber
“Perhaps I could free the poor creature?”
–Warly
“Where you grow from?”
–Wormwood
“That marble doesn't look structurally sound to me.”
–Winona
“A terrible fate, to be locked in this state.”
–Wortox
“Heehee, stinky Pig all locked up!”
–Wurt
“Hey, what's that stuff inside?”
–Walter
“They seem breakable... but I don't think that'd be wise.”
–Wanda
The Cracked Pillars are naturally spawning structures exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Wilson Rework Update. They appear at the first day of the world in the Muddy Biome in the Caves, along with the Nightmare Werepig that chained in place.
The Cracked Pillars possess a layer of Marble that can be mined to expose the Dreadstone that prevents the Nightmare Werepig from moving.
Hitting an exposed Cracked Pillar with a strong mining tool will cause it to vibrate for a short period of time, which will loosen its chain. Making all Cracked Pillars vibrate at the same time frees the Nightmare Werepig and initiates the boss fight. The tools that work to vibrate the Pillars are:
Pick/Axe
Brightshade Smasher
Woodie as Werebeaver with the The Werebeaver III Skill
The Nightmare Werepig's ground slam attack is the only thing that can ultimately destroy the Cracked Pillars, dropping 3-4 Dreadstones and 1 Marble with 50% chance.
After defeating the Nightmare Werepig, the Scrappy Werepig can be found in Teetering Junk Pile on the surface after 10 days. The player has to defeat the Scrappy Werepig and wait for another 10 days for the Cracked Pillar set piece and Nightmare Werepig to reappear in the Muddy Biome.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Các Trụ Cột Bị Nứt là các cấu trúc sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Bản cập nhật Làm lại Wilson. Chúng xuất hiện vào ngày đầu tiên của thế giới trong Quần xã Bùn lầy trong Hang động, cùng với Lợn Sói Ác Mộng bị xích tại chỗ.

After defeating the Nightmare Werepig, the [[Scrappy Werepig]] can be found in Teetering Junk Pile on the surface after 10 days.
